View Javadoc
1   package com.hack23.cia.model.external.riksdagen.dokumentlista.impl;
2   
3   import static org.junit.Assert.assertNotNull;
4   import static org.junit.Assert.assertTrue;
5   
6   import java.io.File;
7   
8   import javax.xml.bind.JAXBContext;
9   import javax.xml.bind.Unmarshaller;
10  import javax.xml.parsers.SAXParserFactory;
11  import javax.xml.transform.sax.SAXSource;
12  
13  import org.junit.Test;
14  import org.xml.sax.InputSource;
15  
16  public class DocumentContainerElementTest {
17  
18      @Test
19      public void testUnmarshalXmlToDocumentContainerElement() throws Exception {
20          JAXBContext jaxbContext = JAXBContext.newInstance(DocumentContainerElement.class);
21          Unmarshaller unmarshaller = jaxbContext.createUnmarshaller();
22          
23          // Create parser that ignores namespaces
24          SAXParserFactory saxParserFactory = SAXParserFactory.newInstance();
25          saxParserFactory.setNamespaceAware(false);
26          
27          // Create SAX source with namespace unaware parser
28          InputSource inputSource = new InputSource(new File("src/test/samples/documentlista-2025b.xml").toURI().toString());
29          SAXSource source = new SAXSource(saxParserFactory.newSAXParser().getXMLReader(), inputSource);
30          
31          DocumentContainerElement documentContainerElement = (DocumentContainerElement) unmarshaller.unmarshal(source);
32          
33          assertNotNull(documentContainerElement);
34          assertTrue(documentContainerElement.getDokument().size() > 0);
35      }
36  }
